ValidationRule.description: Display & Mandatory Only If DividendPolicy = Distributing
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), $Permission.PRPLegal = true, RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Engineering', ISPICKVAL( ProjectShareclasses__r.DividendPolicy__c , 'Distributing'), ISBLANK(TEXT(DividendFrequency__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If DividendPolicy = Distributing you must provide the Dividend Frequency
